calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR #7235.

Daniel M. Bornstein, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mercy Housing California.
Annie McGuire, Agent for Mercy Housing California, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Alicia Duke.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on October 3, 2011.

Exhibit--1--Department of Housing & Urban Development
Model Lease signed 8/8/03.................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit--2--10 Day Notice to Cure or Quit.............................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Mercy Housing California, and against defendant Alicia Duke as follows:

Past-Due Rent - Waived.
Holdover Damages - Waived.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Mercy Housing California is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 926 Fillmore Street, #202, San Francisco, CA. The rental agreement is canceled.

Counsel for plaintiff stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is present. Represented by Henry Liu
Attorney Daniel Cheung appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Alicia Duke is not present.

The settlement conference did not occur because there was no appearance by defendant.

The trial date of OCT-17-2011 remains on calendar.
